RuleTextShort: Interpret 'x cents per square foot' as USD $x per sqft (e.g., .30 cents => $0.30).
NotesShort: Prevents absurd $0.0030 interpretation; applies only when text explicitly says 'cents'.

RuleTextShort: Minimum charge applies to first hour; then regular hourly rate.
NotesShort: Store as rule to avoid mixing with hourly bands.

RuleTextShort: Should never make less than $45/hr for one-man rig.
First time clean: double the regular monthly cleaning price.
Per pane charge is per side; avg around $2.00 per pane/per side (moderate soil).
